topics.title: Free Energy Principle and Portfolio Optimization
topics.description: Can Friston free energy minimization explain optimal portfolio rebalancing?

topics.title: Game Theory and Immune System Regulation
topics.description: Can evolutionary game theory explain how the immune system maintains self-nonself discrimination and avoids autoimmunity? Nash equilibria in lymphocyte populations.

strategy.reasoning: Three domains detected (game theory, immunology, evolution) with clear causal framing (how does the immune system maintain discrimination?). Serendipity for cross-domain bridge discovery between game theory concepts (Nash equilibrium, ESS, replicator dynamics) and immunology concepts (clonal selection, self/nonself discrimination, tolerance). Causal for the mechanism analysis of how evolutionary dynamics produce self-nonself discrimination.
